channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: S&P 500 futures tick lower as Wall Street awaits May jobs report: Live updates
item.description: The S&P 500 is on track to finish the week slightly higher, which would mark its 10th straight week of gains and its longest win streak since 1985.

item.title: Trump says he could meet Iran's supreme leader 'if it was to make a deal'
item.description: Khamenei was named the supreme leader in Iran after his father, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, was killed on the first day of fighting.

item.title: Quantinuum closes flat in Nasdaq debut, after upsized offering
item.description: Honeywell will retain a majority stake in Quantinuum and will continue to be a strategic customer and partner following the listing.

item.title: India's cenbank cuts growth outlook, raises inflation forecast as it keeps rates steady at 5.25%
item.description: RBI raised its inflation projection for the year ending March 2027 by 50 basis points to 5.1%, while cutting growth forecast to 6.6% for the year, from 6.9%.

item.title: These income funds offer double-digit yields – but come with cost and complexity. How they work
item.description: Autocallable ETFs offer attractive coupon payments, but investors should prepare to do some homework if they're exploring these funds.

item.title: Tracking website, food watch: South Korea is obsessing over Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's visit
item.description: South Korean investors are eagerly tracking Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's every move as they wait to see what the AI megacap company will do next.

item.title: South Korea stocks fall 5% as tech heavyweights follow plunge in Wall Street's AI-linked names
item.description: Asia-Pacific markets fell on Friday as investors assessed a rotation out of chip stocks on Wall Street that lifted the Dow Jones Industrial Average to a record close.

item.title: Trump says Pulte won't be permanent national intelligence director
item.description: Trump's comment came two days after he tapped Bill Pulte, who leads the Federal Housing Finance Agency, as acting DNI to replace Tulsi Gabbard.

item.title: Warren invites Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to Senate hearing on China AI chip sales
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren is pressing Jensen Huang's Nvidia over export controls, China sales, Trump and data-center policy as Congress scrutinizes the AI chip boom.

item.title: ‘Buying stuff like it’s going out of fashion’: Biotech M&A on track for best year since pre-Covid
item.description: Driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets, and Big Pharma's race to beef up their pipelines, dealmaking in 2026 is off to a strong start.

item.title: Bluesky was launched as a Twitter rival — but it's far less popular. Now it's eyeing Reddit for inspiration
item.description: "I think the public square is not the direction we want to go in...we're very inspired by companies like Reddit," Bluesky's Rose Wang told CNBC.

item.title: India's viral 'Cockroach' party has millions of followers. What investors need to know
item.description: A Gen Z-led, social media-first mock political party in India that has amassed millions of followers and is set to hold an in-person protest on Saturday.

item.title: Flesh-eating screwworm is confirmed in the U.S., officials say
item.description: The USDA and Texas officials are working to contain New World screwworm from Zavala County, including establishing an infested zone and enforcing quarantine.

item.title: This drugmaker is developing breakthroughs like an 'EpiPen for heart attacks.' The market has yet to give it credit
item.description: The key to its growth are a non-opioid pain reliever, a potential blockbuster lupus treatment and a drug that has been dubbed an "EpiPen for heart attacks."

item.title: Elon Musk's net worth poised to sail past $1 trillion in SpaceX IPO
item.description: Based on SpaceX's updated IPO prospectus, Elon Musk owns shares in the company worth more than $866 billion.

item.title: Honeywell’s quantum company goes public. What investors should know about the IPO
item.description: It's a win for Honeywell as the offering gives a valuation to a business that investors previously had to guess what it was worth.

item.title: Eli Manning weighs in on Giants QB Jaxson Dart's Trump rally fallout
item.description: Eli Manning spoke about political activities from athletes after Giants QB Jaxson Dart introduced President Donald Trump at a rally.

item.title: Asia tech stocks drop after Broadcom rattles AI trade and drags Wall Street names lower
item.description: Asian technology shares fell, tracking losses in U.S. semiconductor stocks after disappointing earnings Broadcom sparked a rotation out of AI-linked names.

item.title: SpaceX blocked from early U.S. benchmark index entry as S&P reaffirms existing rules
item.description: S&P Global said Thursday it was not changing the requirements for entry into its major indices, dealing a setback to the IPO plans of Elon Musk's SpaceX.

item.title: Ships stranded in Persian Gulf quietly coordinate with U.S. Navy to exit Hormuz
item.description: Clashes erupted between the U.S. and Iran over commercial ships earlier this week.

item.title: Lululemon cuts annual outlook, citing 'negative' media commentary and disappointing product launches
item.description: Lululemon is expecting its situation to get a lot worse before it gets better, as it issued weak guidance for the full year.

item.title: CNBC Select’s weekly mortgage rate snapshot: See your options today
item.description: Here's what mortgage rates are for the week ending June 4, according to Freddie Mac.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Lululemon Athletica, ServiceTitan, Argan and more
item.description: See which stocks are posting big moves after the bell.

item.title: Jim Cramer says Thursday's rally shows investors' 'huge appetite' for stocks
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said Thursday's rally showed investors remain resilient and eager to buy stocks.

item.title: Blackstone restricts flagship fund withdrawals as private asset fears reemerge
item.description: Blackstone capped withdrawals from its $79 billion BCRED fund after redemption requests rose from 7.9% to 10%, adding to private market liquidity concerns.

item.title: Long-term unemployment is surging in the U.S. There are hidden costs for workers and the economy
item.description: Long-term unemployment can have ramifications on financial, emotional and family health that linger even after reentry into the workforce.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Five Below, Broadcom, Blackstone, UnitedHealth & more
item.description: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Bitcoin is weathering its ugliest week in months as narrative fades and liquidity rotates
item.description: Bitcoin is getting pummeled to kick off June as the market loses its dominant narrative and liquidity continues to rotate into other assets.

item.title: As the largest World Cup ever kicks off, health officials are focused on more than Ebola
item.description: Officials are more concerned about highly contagious diseases like measles and respiratory viruses, which can spread quickly through large, fast-moving crowds.

item.title: Confirmed screwworm case in Texas sends two biotech stocks higher
item.description: Options volume is surging for Zoetis as traders look for potential stock market winners in light of a screwworm case in Texas.
